title: Dr Samridhi Suman: Accounting and Finance Lecturer Profile
text: Dr Samridhi Suman, holding a PhD from IIT D, is a Lecturer in Accounting and Finance at the University of Southampton Delhi. She is dedicated to student learning through mentorship and delivering complex finance and accounting concepts engagingly. Her research interests primarily lie at the intersection of corporate governance and corporate finance, specifically focusing on the financial implications of board structures, board gender diversity, and promoter ownership. Her doctoral research investigated the impact of various corporate governance mechanisms on corporate finance decisions. Dr Suman's work has been published in peer-reviewed journals and presented at numerous conferences, including receiving the Best Paper Award at the Academy for Global Business Advancement 16th World Congress. She is also a recipient of the UGC JRF fellowship and IIT Delhi’s Research Scholars Travel Award. Prior to joining the University of Southampton Delhi, Dr Suman served as an Assistant Professor at OP Jindal Global University. She completed her PhD in 2024 from the Department of Management Studies, Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IITD), and holds undergraduate and postgraduate degrees in Commerce from the University of Delhi.
summary: Dr Samridhi Suman is a Lecturer in Accounting and Finance at the University of Southampton Delhi, specializing in corporate governance and finance. Her research, published in peer-reviewed journals, focuses on board structures and promoter ownership.
entities: Academy for Global Business Advancement 16th World Congress
IIT Delhi’s Research Scholars Travel Award

title: Dr Samridhi Suman's Academic Publications in Finance
text: Publications by Dr Samridhi Suman include: "Corporate Governance Monitoring Mechanisms and Corporate Performance and Valuation: Lessons from India" by Singh, S. & Suman, S. (2025), published by Springer. "The Role of Multiple Large Shareholders in Dividend Payouts: Evidence from India" by Suman, S. & Singh, S. (2022), featured in American Business Review, 25(1), 120-151. Additionally, "Corporate governance mechanisms and corporate investments: evidence from India" by Suman, S., & Singh, S. (2021) appeared in International Journal of Productivity and Performance Management, 70(3), 635-656.
summary: This section lists Dr Samridhi Suman's key academic publications, focusing on corporate governance, corporate performance, dividend payouts, and corporate investments in India.
entities: International Journal of Productivity and Performance Management
